environments.description: The list environments command lists environments in Endevor

params.environment: Name of the Endevor environment. Wildcards (*,%) are supported.
params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

stages.description: The list stages command lists stages in Endevor

params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

systems.description: The list systems command lists system information in Endevor

params.system: Name of the Endevor system. Wildcards (*,%) are supported.
params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

subsystems.description: The list subsystems command lists subsystem information in Endevor

params.subsystem: Name of the Endevor subsystem. Wildcards (*,%) are supported.
params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

types.description: The list types command lists type information in Endevor

params.type: Name of the Endevor element type. Wildcards (*,%) are supported (e.g. COBPGM, COPYBOOK, JCL).
params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

elements.description: The list elements command lists element information in Endevor

params.element: Name of the Endevor element. Wildcards (*,%) are supported.
params.type: Name of the Endevor element type (e.g. COBPGM, COPYBOOK, JCL). Use * for all types.
params.search: Indicates that Endevor should perform the action across all elements that match using the Endevor map.
params.data: Specify the data details to retrieve. BAS - returns base elements, ELE - returns elements with additional information, ALL - returns all available element information.
params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

packages.description: The list packages command lists package information in Endevor

params.status: Status of the Endevor package (e.g. INENDEVOR, APPROVED, EXECUTED, COMMITTED).
params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

processorGroups.description: The list processor-groups command lists processor group information in Endevor

params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

element.description: The print element command prints selected information about Element in Endevor

params.type: Name of the Endevor element type.
params.search: Indicates that Endevor should perform the action across all elements that match using the Endevor map.
params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

components.description: Query components used by a specified Element with the Endevor Application Component Manager

params.element: Name of the Endevor element to query for component dependencies.
params.instance: Name of the Endevor Web Services instance.

fields.environment: Name of the Endevor environment (e.g. DEV, PRD). Wildcards (*,%) are supported.
fields.system: Name of the Endevor system (e.g. SYS1). Wildcards (*,%) are supported.
fields.subsystem: Name of the Endevor subsystem (e.g. SUB1). Wildcards (*,%) are supported.
fields.type: Name of the Endevor element type (e.g. COBPGM, COPYBOOK, JCL). Wildcards (*,%) are supported.
